verdict_reasoning: ITPR1 is an endoplasmic reticulum calcium channel with 6 transmembrane domains embedded in ER membrane, with the regulatory domain facing cytoplasm and TM stalk inserted in ER. No surface-directed therapeutics; no ectodomain shedding; no documented PM pool, cycling, or state-induced surface translocation. No evidence of cancer-induced, cell-death-induced, or activation-induced ecto-presentation. ER-resident only.
